case_title: WISSEM KHERIJE VS. RICHARD GALINDO et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR PUBLICATION OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION (NO ORDER SUBMITTED W/ APPLICATION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHERIJE, WISSEM

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-06-2004 CONTINUED TO AUG-16-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). JUL-06-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 225 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-16-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: SUSAN LEE. (212)
